emails.body: 481620/481621 I just changed both of these deals to CAISO energy, instead of Firm. I noticed that the one you asked about, #481620, was part of an EES sleeve, so I checked the other side of it, deal #481621, and sure enough it also had the incorrect energy type. It's holiday fever! Thanks, Kate

emails.subject: Re: 481620/481621
emails.body: Re: 481620/481621 You're on the job girl! I just got your email. Don't worry about all the errors, if they didn't make mistakes, we wouldn't have a job, and it's no worse now than it's ever been. But you are very responsive and fun to work with -that makes all the difference! Just a little positivity (can't have too much of that!) Kate Symes ECT 12/21/2000 11:59 AM
